query: SELECT id, canonicalName, imageStatus, CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS_IMAGE' ELSE 'NO_IMAGE' END as hasImage, CASE WHEN sourceUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS_URL' ELSE 'NO_URL' END as hasUrl FROM product_master ORDER BY id
